title: Collection Body Sections
description: Markdown body sections expected in every collection file. Not frontmatter — populated during batch ingest.

## Description.description: What this collection covers and why these sources are grouped together. Write once on creation; do not overwrite.

## Sources.description: Bullet list of [[source_id]] wikilinks with a one-line description of each item's contribution. Append new entries after each ingest run; never duplicate.

## Key concepts covered.description: Aggregated bullet list of [[concept_id]] wikilinks touched across all sources, with a one-line summary of what the collection adds to each concept. Append new entries; never duplicate.

## Notes.description: Free-form notes about the collection as a whole. Append paragraphs; preserve existing text.
